\tzpentry{ID3306}{Magnetic Flux Wave Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3306 introduces Magnetic Flux Wave Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \frac{1}{c_s^2} \frac{ \partial^2 \Phi}{ \partial t^2} - \nabla^2 \Phi - \frac{2}{c_s^2} \boldsymbol{ \omega} \cdot ( \mathbf{r} \times \nabla) \frac{ \partial \Phi}{ \partial t} = 0 \end{equation}
